message: chore: replace logo-with-text with icon-only logo everywhere, remove docmed_logo_test.png

feat: landing page content and nav cleanup

- Navbar: removed Pricing/Docs, added Contact linking to #cta section
- Hero badge: increased contrast (border/bg opacity bumped)
- Hero paragraph + no-credit-card text: improved contrast
- TrustBar: replaced fake company names with real product attributes
- Features: Version Healing → PR-Based Updates, Universal Integrations → GitHub App Integration
- Stats: replaced 30+ integrations and 99.9% uptime with accurate facts
- CTA: removed SOC 2 compliant, replaced with GitHub App powered
- Footer: removed Product/Developers/Company link columns, expanded brand
  description, added single Navigate column, bottom links now point to
  Features / How it Works / Contact
